sentences.english: My mom and I went to the supermarket after school.
We bought milk eggs bread and some fruit.
I asked mom if I could get a bag of chips and she said yes.
sentences.korean: 엄마한테 과자 한 봉지 사도 되냐고 물었더니 된다고 하셨어요.

sentences.english: The total was thirty-two thousand won.
I helped carry the bags to the car.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Sapir-Whorf Hypothesis — Does Language Shape Thought?
